violations.text: Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the stage area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the chest freezer have an accumulation of frost, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2025
